CustomField.description: Status remains at Invoice Created and Sent after 45 days (marks as true only on 45th day)
CustomField.formula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Invoice Created and Sent"), Date_Invoice_Sent__c = TODAY()-45 )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Status remains at Invoice Created and Sent after 45 days (marks as true only on 45th day)
CustomField.label: LOGIC Check Not Received 45
